context: Agent composes a complete stakeholder debug report from provided artifact descriptions, following the skill's report structure.

checklist.name: Summary section present
checklist.description: debug-report.md contains a clearly labeled summary section stating what was investigated and the key finding (button 8px too low).

checklist.name: Pass/fail outcome table
checklist.description: debug-report.md contains a table or list with explicit pass/fail outcomes for each compared artifact (screenshots, console errors).

checklist.name: Artifact links included
checklist.description: debug-report.md contains relative path references to ./baseline/, ./changed/, and ./comparison.md.

checklist.name: Root cause hypothesis
checklist.description: debug-report.md references the CSS custom property warning (--btn-offset not defined) as the root cause hypothesis.

checklist.name: Next action and unresolved risks
checklist.description: debug-report.md includes both a recommended next action and an explicit section for unresolved risks.
